title: thelypteris limbosperma
intro: Thelypteris limbosperma, commonly known as the New Zealand fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. The therapeutic actions of Thelypteris limbosperma include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, which can help in wound healing and fighting off infections. side_effects: Thelypteris limbosperma can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems, particularly for individuals with pre-existing conditions like asthma.
